---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or service for RDE
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What can't you currently do with RDE?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. If this involves:

- **A new D-Bus method/signal** on an existing service — note which service and sketch the intended signature.
- **A new service entirely** — see [`docs/architecture.md#adding-a-new-service`](../../docs/architecture.md#adding-a-new-service) first; note how it would fit the existing supervisor/D-Bus model.
- **A change to the internal IPC protocol** — flag this explicitly, since it affects `rde-daemon` and every service simultaneously.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you didn't go with them.

## Additional Context

Mockups, links to similar functionality in other desktop environments, related issues, etc.
